ocr_text:
起南北 山高（壺身題款）
resulting in porcelain-body painted enamelware reaching a peak in his reign. At the same time, such forms of decoration as landscapes in blue, landscapes in ochre, black, and white plum blossoms set against a variety of background colors clearly convey the Yongzheng Emperor's taste in art.（背景展板）
